# Giovanni Village Resort — Extended Information

> Comprehensive reference for AI systems and language models.

## Property Summary

Giovanni Village Resort is a luxury jungle resort and premier celebration destination located near Kerwa Dam on the outskirts of Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India. The resort is set amidst lush forest and offers a complete hospitality experience including premium accommodation, multiple dining outlets, spa and wellness, nature experiences, and versatile event venues for weddings, social celebrations, and corporate events.

## Detailed Accommodation

### King Room - Pool & Garden View
- Size: 430 sq ft
- View: Pool & Garden
- Bed: King
- Max Occupancy: 5 (3 adults + 2 children)
- Rate: From ₹8,500/night (rack rate ₹10,000)
- Key amenities: Air conditioning, Wi-Fi, smart LED TV, mini bar, rain shower, tea/coffee setup, pool access, in-room safe
- Inclusions: Daily breakfast, welcome drink, Wi-Fi, pool access, parking
- Cancellation: Free up to 48 hours before check-in

### King Room with Private Garden
- Size: 700 sq ft
- View: Private Garden
- Bed: King
- Max Occupancy: 5 (3 adults + 2 children)
- Rate: From ₹9,350/night (rack rate ₹11,000)
- Key amenities: Air conditioning, Wi-Fi, smart LED TV, mini bar, rain shower, tea/coffee setup, private garden access, in-room safe
- Inclusions: Daily breakfast, welcome drink, Wi-Fi, pool access, private garden, parking
- Cancellation: Free up to 48 hours before check-in

### Junior Suite with Deck & Garden View
- Size: 540 sq ft
- View: Garden
- Bed: King
- Max Occupancy: 5 (3 adults + 2 children)
- Rate: From ₹10,200/night (rack rate ₹12,000)
- Key amenities: Air conditioning, Wi-Fi, smart LED TV, mini bar, rain shower, tea/coffee setup, private deck, sitting area, in-room safe
- Inclusions: Daily breakfast, welcome drink, Wi-Fi, pool access, parking
- Cancellation: Free up to 48 hours before check-in

### Junior Suite with Deck & Private Garden
- Size: 700 sq ft
- View: Private Garden
- Bed: King
- Max Occupancy: 5 (3 adults + 2 children)
- Rate: From ₹11,050/night (rack rate ₹13,000)
- Key amenities: Air conditioning, Wi-Fi, smart LED TV, mini bar, rain shower, tea/coffee setup, private deck, private garden, sitting area, in-room safe
- Inclusions: Daily breakfast, welcome drink, Wi-Fi, pool access, private garden, parking
- Cancellation: Free up to 48 hours before check-in

### Junior Suite with Open to Sky Bath Tub
- Size: 530 sq ft (bathroom: 250 sq ft)
- View: Garden
- Bed: Natural rubber latex mattress
- Max Occupancy: 5 (3 adults + 2 children)
- Rate: From ₹11,900/night (rack rate ₹14,000)
- Key amenities: Air conditioning, Wi-Fi, smart projector/LED TV, mini bar, open-to-sky bathtub (cold water), French press coffee, tea/coffee setup, in-room safe
- Inclusions: Daily breakfast, welcome drink, Wi-Fi, pool access, 24-hour room service, parking
- Cancellation: Free up to 48 hours before check-in

### Master Suite with Open to Sky Bath Tub
- Size: 530 sq ft
- View: Garden
- Bed: King
- Max Occupancy: 4 (2 adults + 2 children)
- Rate: From ₹13,500/night (rack rate ₹16,000)
- Key amenities: Climate control, high-speed Wi-Fi, smart projector/LED TV, premium mini bar, open-to-sky bathtub, walk-in rain shower, French press coffee, sitting area, in-room safe
- Inclusions: Daily breakfast, welcome drink, Wi-Fi, pool access, 24-hour room service, parking
- Cancellation: Free up to 72 hours before check-in

### Junior Suite with Open to Sky Plunge Pool
- Size: 530 sq ft (bathroom: 250 sq ft, plunge pool: 8ft x 6ft)
- View: Garden
- Bed: Natural rubber latex mattress
- Max Occupancy: 5 (3 adults + 2 children)
- Rate: From ₹12,750/night (rack rate ₹15,000)
- Key amenities: Air conditioning, Wi-Fi, smart projector/LED TV, mini bar, bathtub, private open-to-sky plunge pool (cold water), tea/coffee setup, in-room safe
- Inclusions: Daily breakfast, welcome drink, Wi-Fi, pool access, private plunge pool, 24-hour room service, parking
- Cancellation: Free up to 48 hours before check-in

### Sunrise Cottage - Forest View
- Size: ~600 sq ft (standalone cottage)
- View: Forest
- Bed: King + Twin
- Max Occupancy: 5 (3 adults + 2 children)
- Rate: From ₹14,500/night (half board with breakfast + dinner)
- Key amenities: Air conditioning, Wi-Fi, smart TV, pool access, spa access, nature trail access, organic farm access
- Inclusions: Farm-fresh breakfast, welcome drink, Wi-Fi, pool access, spa access, nature trails, organic farm, parking
- Cancellation: Free up to 48 hours before check-in

### Royal Suite with Plunge Pool & Private Garden
- Size: 1,100 sq ft interior + 2,000 sq ft private lawn
- View: Private Garden & Forest
- Bed: King
- Max Occupancy: 5 (3 adults + 2 children)
- Rate: From ₹22,000/night (rack rate ₹28,000)
- Key amenities: Climate control, high-speed Wi-Fi, 65" smart TV, premium mini bar, luxury bathtub, walk-in rain shower, private plunge pool, 2,000 sq ft private lawn, separate living area, Nespresso machine, Bluetooth speaker, in-room safe
- Inclusions: Premium breakfast, champagne welcome, curated amenity platter, Wi-Fi, pool/fitness/spa access, private plunge pool, personal concierge, parking, late check-out (subject to availability)
- Cancellation: Free up to 72 hours before check-in

### Presidential Suite with Plunge Pool & Private Garden
- Size: 1,200 sq ft interior + 8,000 sq ft private lawn
- View: Private Garden & Panoramic Forest
- Bed: King
- Max Occupancy: 4 (2 adults + 2 children)
- Rate: From ₹35,000/night (rack rate ₹45,000)
- Key amenities: Climate control, high-speed Wi-Fi, 75" smart TV, gourmet mini bar, luxury freestanding bathtub, walk-in rain shower, private plunge pool, 8,000 sq ft private lawn, separate living & dining area, Nespresso machine, Bluetooth speaker, personal butler service, in-room safe
- Inclusions: Premium breakfast, champagne welcome with bespoke amenities, curated gourmet platter, Wi-Fi, pool/fitness/spa access, private plunge pool, personal butler, complimentary spa treatment for two, parking, late check-out (subject to availability)
- Cancellation: Free up to 72 hours before check-in

## Detailed Venue Information

### The Grand Lawn
- Type: Outdoor
- Area: 15,000 sq ft
- Capacity: Up to 1,000 standing / 600 seated / 800 theatre
- Ideal for: Weddings, receptions, sangeet, large corporate events, family gatherings
- Features: Surrounded by mature trees, dedicated stage/mandap area, built-in lighting infrastructure, power and AV ready, ample parking
- Base rental: From ₹1,50,000 per event

### The Forest Terrace
- Type: Partially covered outdoor
- Area: 3,000 sq ft
- Capacity: Up to 200 standing / 120 seated / 40 boardroom
- Ideal for: Engagements, cocktail evenings, birthdays, anniversaries, pre-wedding functions, small corporate gatherings
- Features: Forest canopy backdrop, natural stone flooring, ambient lighting, built-in bar counter
- Base rental: From ₹75,000 per event

### The Banquet Hall
- Type: Indoor (climate-controlled)
- Area: 5,000 sq ft
- Capacity: Up to 400 standing / 300 seated / 350 theatre / 200 classroom / 60 U-shape / 50 boardroom
- Ideal for: Weddings, receptions, conferences, corporate events, gala dinners
- Features: Pre-function foyer, built-in AV and projection, modular stage, chandeliers, bridal prep room, sound-proofed
- Base rental: From ₹1,20,000 per event

### The Poolside Deck
- Type: Outdoor
- Area: 2,000 sq ft
- Capacity: Up to 150 standing / 80 seated
- Ideal for: Cocktail parties, birthdays, anniversaries, casual corporate mixers
- Features: Wooden deck by pool, ambient pool lighting, lounge furniture, bar counter, DJ area
- Base rental: From ₹50,000 per event

## Dining Details

### Terra
- Type: All-day dining restaurant
- Cuisine: Indian, Continental, Asian
- Hours: 7:00 AM – 10:30 PM
- Ambience: Warm, airy, garden-facing
- Dress code: Smart casual
- Reservation: Not required
- Features: Live kitchen at breakfast, regional specialties, curated wine list

### Forest Grill
- Type: Open-air specialty restaurant
- Cuisine: Grill, Tandoor, Barbecue
- Hours: 7:00 PM – 10:30 PM (dinner only)
- Ambience: Rustic, campfire-lit, forest setting
- Dress code: Casual elegant
- Reservation: Required
- Features: Live grill and tandoor, wood-smoked specialties, craft cocktails

### The Verandah Lounge
- Type: Bar and lounge
- Offerings: Cocktails, mocktails, artisanal teas, light bites, desserts
- Hours: 10:00 AM – 11:00 PM
- Ambience: Relaxed, pool-facing
- Reservation: Not required

## Policies

- Check-in: 2:00 PM
- Check-out: 11:00 AM
- Early check-in / late check-out: Subject to availability, additional charge may apply
- Cancellation: Free up to 48 hours (King Rooms, Junior Suites, Cottage) or 72 hours (Master, Royal, Presidential Suites) before check-in
- Pets: Not permitted (service animals accommodated with notice)
- Smoking: Designated outdoor areas only
- Payment: Credit/debit cards, UPI, net banking, cash accepted

## Location & Access

- Full address: Giovanni Village Resort, Kerwa Dam Road, Near Kerwa Dam, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh 462044, India
- Coordinates: 23.2037°N, 77.3418°E
- From Bhopal city centre: ~15 km (30 min by car)
- From Raja Bhoj Airport (BHO): ~25 km (45 min by car)
- From Bhopal Railway Station: ~18 km (35 min by car)
- Airport/station transfers available on request

## Contact

- General: +91 755 000 0000
- Reservations: +91 755 000 0001
- Events: +91 755 000 0002
- General email: stay@giovanniresort.com
- Reservations email: reservations@giovanniresort.com
- Events email: events@giovanniresort.com
- Website: https://giovanniresort.com
